response.original_title: Taller videográfico de la memoria de Cajamarca
response.overview: Is it possible to rebuild through a collection of archives? Based on a video workshop organized in Peru in the summer of 2022, this short film aims at initiating the creation of a freely accessible, grassroots video archive for anyone who, in the future, wishes to preserve and continue building upon local memory.
response.title: Taller videográfico de la memoria de Cajamarca
